name: Easy Cheesy Snack Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Italian Seasoning, dried and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 2 cups of the flour and undissolved yeast with Italian seasoning, salt, and minced garlic. Stir in warm water.
2. Beat mixture with an electric mixer for 2 minutes at medium speed, scraping the bowl occasionally.
3. Add eggs and mix in another 1/2 cup of flour; beat for 2 more minutes at high speed, scraping the bowl.
4. With a spoon, mix in cheese and enough flour to form a soft dough. Cover and let rest for 10 minutes.
5. Spread the dough evenly on a greased jelly roll pan using the back of a large metal spoon or lightly oiled hands.
6. Sprinkle remaining cheese over the dough. Top with chilies and pimentos.
7. Let the bread rise in a warm, draft-free place until it is light and puffy, about 20 minutes.
8. Bake at 400F (200C) for 20 to 25 minutes or until done. Serve warm and cut into squares. Makes about 24 squares.
